query_title: Bill Burr: You People Are All The Same

recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Walk Your Way Out
recommendations.overview: No-nonsense comic Bill Burr takes the stage in Nashville and riffs on fast food, overpopulation, dictators and gorilla sign language.

recommendations.title: Ali Wong: Hard Knock Wife
recommendations.overview: Pregnant again, Ali Wong returns to Netflix in her second original stand-up comedy special and gets real on why having kids is not all it's cracked up to be.

recommendations.title: Ali Wong: Baby Cobra
recommendations.overview: Ali Wong might be seven-months pregnant, but there’s not a fetus in the world that can stop this acerbic and savage train of comedy from delivering a masterful hour of stand-up.

recommendations.title: The Main Event
recommendations.overview: An 11-year-old aspiring wrestler enters a competition to become the next WWE superstar by using special powers from a magical mask.

recommendations.title: Bill Burr: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way
recommendations.overview: Fresh, unflinching and devastatingly honest, Bill Burr lets loose in this feature length comedy special. Burr shares his essential tips for surviving the zombie apocalypse, exposes how rom-coms ruin great sex and explains how too many childhood hugs

recommendations.title: The Swap
recommendations.overview: Based on the book by Megan Shull, The Swap follows the adventures of a rhythmic gymnast named Ellie with a make-it-or-break-it competition, and the younger brother named Jack in a hockey family who's vying for a varsity spot on his school team. But w

recommendations.title: The Truman Show
recommendations.overview: In a picture-perfect seaside town, an insurance salesman begins to realize that his entire existence may be staged and observed by a vast unseen audience as part of a reality TV show.

recommendations.title: Vacation Friends
recommendations.overview: When a straight-laced couple that has fun with a rowdy couple on vacation in Mexico return to the States, they discover that the crazy couple they met in Mexico followed them back home and decide to play tricks on them.

recommendations.title: Nineties
recommendations.overview: Scandalously famous collections of short Italian comedies of the 90s! All that was "fun" in those years in Italy - all here! The sea of black humor on all issues - sex, politics, mafia, crime, TV...

recommendations.title: Pleasantville
recommendations.overview: Geeky teenager David and his popular twin sister, Jennifer, get sucked into the black-and-white world of a 1950s TV sitcom called "Pleasantville," and find a world where everything is peachy keen all the time. But when Jennifer's modern attitude disr
